## Post metadata
- Title:
- Author alias:
- Category:
- Tags (comma separated):
- Read time (example: 5 MIN READ):
- Cover image URL:
- Short summary:

## Post markdown
<!-- Paste your markdown post below. Include headings and any code blocks. -->

```md
# Main title

Your post content here.
```

## Checklist
- [ ] I confirm this content is original or I have rights to publish it.
- [ ] I accept that editors may adjust format before publishing.
- [ ] I reviewed spelling and links.
